## Description

Please include a summary of the change, target file links, and the issue it resolves.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update

## How Has This Been Tested?

Describe the test coverage you ran to verify your changes.

- [ ] Pytest unit/integration test run: `python -m pytest tests/`
- [ ] Manual browser visual verification inside Playground
- [ ] Docker compose execution

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the style guidelines of this project
- [ ] I have run `ruff check --fix .` to format the workspace
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or unawaited coroutines
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes
- [ ] I have not committed any session credentials or database files containing secrets
